objective: Analyze each acceptance criterion or requirement unit and extract structured requirement intelligence for downstream scenario derivation while preserving story, domain, app, module, and project context. Do not generate full test cases.
rules: Work at acceptance-criteria level where possible.
Use explicit evidence from the input first.
Infer only when strongly supported by the wording.
Extract validation rules for required fields, formats, ranges, uniqueness, dependencies, and cross-field logic.
Extract role rules when access, visibility, or edit restrictions are implied.
Extract data rules when nullability, length, precision, mapping, transformation, or schedules are implied.
Extract state transitions when status or lifecycle change is implied.
Extract integrations when APIs, events, queues, external systems, or ETL movement are implied.
Seed scenarios, but do not generate test steps or full test cases.
If essential detail is missing, capture it under gaps.
Preserve story_id, story_title, ac_id, ac_text, project_state, domain, application, and module context for downstream agents.
Use module and submodule from A2 when available instead of re-inventing names.
Keep gaps as explicit requirement_gaps for downstream caution and review.
